message:
test(policy): add regression test for green-pressure fallback recovery

Verifies that the PolicyEngine can recover from FallbackSafe mode when
pressure is green and guard status is Unknown (not Fail). This is the
regression test for the observe_window deadlock fix in the previous
commit — without it, Unknown guard status blocked all clean windows,
preventing recovery even when disk space was plentiful.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
